What matters is that, step by step, we are carrying out our plan of long-range sanctions – in response to everything Russia is doing against our country and our people. All forms of our sanctions – legal and entirely practical long-range ones – are working to bring peace closer. Thank you for your precision!

items.title: Hegseth Hails China Relationship at Defense Summit
items.summary:
Jabs at European allies and talks of stable US-China ties — Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth took to the stage at a security summit in Singapore this weekend. 

But two topics were notably missing from his address: Taiwan and the Iran war. Haslinda Amin with more. (Source: Bloomberg)
